title: Am I missing something End of Rebuild 20
display_title: Am I missing something End of Rebuild 20
wikitext:
[]: Am I missing something? (End of Rebuild 2.0)             Quote Post by boynamedcrow » Mon Apr 25, 2011 5:43 pm Hi everyone, so I did a bunch of searching to try and find anything about this, and wasn't able to, however if this has already been discussed in another thread, I am sorry! Anyway: when Mari activates Unit 02, we then see it shoot past Misato as she descends to Nerv HQ. She asks whoever she's on the phone with (I'm assuming some Nerv personel) why it is launching, and they say they don't know/didn't order it. Then, when Misato arrives and joins Ritsuko etc., they are all talking aboutu sending up Unit 00 to back up Unit 02...I know they also try to make communication and it is blocked...but here's my question: How come they aren't more freaked out??? Unit 02 is suddenly launching without permission, not responding, yet they seem pretty calm about that and focus on other things...I know that it's not super important, but they seem to accept that there is no explanation for why it launched. Also: they are later able to read the plug depth, so can't they tell there's a person in there? Don't they wonder who it is?? Just wondering if I missed something/asking for opinions.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Mon Apr 25, 2011 5:47 pm I'm not sure what you want them to do... they're focused on the Angel, and seem to have no control over what happens with Unit-02.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon Apr 25, 2011 6:04 pm Unit 02 is, at this point, under IPEA jurisdiction, not Nerv's. While it would certainly be irregular for IPEA to sortie Unit 02 without telling them, under the circumstances they're probably too glad that somebody is actually doing something to worry about the particulars.

[]:             Quote Post by boynamedcrow » Mon Apr 25, 2011 6:14 pm Azathoth wrote: Unit 02 is, at this point, under IPEA jurisdiction, not Nerv's. While it would certainly be irregular for IPEA to sortie Unit 02 without telling them, under the circumstances they're probably too glad that somebody is actually doing something to worry about the particulars.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Apr 25, 2011 6:15 pm They were sorta out of pilots. Misato does give us quite the shocked face but goes "Well, let them if they want" later, like she did for example, when Asuka refused to act as a backup in ep 22. they'll wonder who Mari is when Zeruel is done for

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Apr 25, 2011 6:24 pm Azathoth wrote: ...under the circumstances they're probably too glad that somebody is actually doing something to worry about the particulars.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Apr 25, 2011 6:30 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: This is my assumption as well. Shit is getting fucked up. They have bigger problems to worry about.
